project.name: Culvert :: data-pipeline-gcp-gcs (Java) — placeholder
project.description: Placeholder for the sprint-1 GCP Cloud Storage adapter (issue #7). Implements BlobStore from data-pipeline-core. The implementing agent should REPLACE THIS ENTIRE FILE with a real pom.xml (deps, plugins, etc.) per the Definition of Done in GitHub issue #7 — do not edit in place. Issue body is canonical scope.
